channel.title: criticalrole TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from criticalrole

item.title: Fingers, toes, other...stuff... 👨‍⚕️ 🩺 Orym of the Air Ashari (@Liam O’Brien) reveals just how much damage he's taken in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - "A Test of Fate"! ✨ @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO @SamRiegel @Marisha
item.description: Fingers, toes, other...stuff... 👨‍⚕️ 🩺 Orym of the Air Ashari (@Liam O’Brien) reveals just how much damage he's taken in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - "A Test of Fate"! ✨ @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO @SamRiegel @Marisha

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔🔥 A fated meeting with the Matron, familiar challengers from the past, and more... Get a quick catch up on #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - “A Test of Fate” with our ever-brilliant Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s one minute recap! ✨ @Matt
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔🔥 A fated meeting with the Matron, familiar challengers from the past, and more... Get a quick catch up on #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - “A Test of Fate” with our ever-brilliant Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s one minute recap! ✨ @Matt

item.title: I DON'T EVEN KNOW IF THEY KNEW I WAS IN THERE 🐺 🪵 Chetney Pock O'Pea (@WillingBlam) gets a little jealous of Braius Doomseed's (@SamRiegel) night with Nana Morri in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - "A Test of Fate"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Liam O’Bri
item.description: I DON'T EVEN KNOW IF THEY KNEW I WAS IN THERE 🐺 🪵 Chetney Pock O'Pea (@WillingBlam) gets a little jealous of Braius Doomseed's (@SamRiegel) night with Nana Morri in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 109 - "A Test of Fate"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Liam O’Bri

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔 🔥 The heroes of #CriticalRole Campaign 3 meet some familiar faces (and pull off some impressive voice switch offs) as the Mighty Nein make their appearance and get to know Bells Hells in Episode 110 - "In the Shadow of War"! ✨ @MatthewMe
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔 🔥 The heroes of #CriticalRole Campaign 3 meet some familiar faces (and pull off some impressive voice switch offs) as the Mighty Nein make their appearance and get to know Bells Hells in Episode 110 - "In the Shadow of War"! ✨ @MatthewMe

item.title: DON'T HAVE MUCH 🗣️ 🎶 Imogen Temult (@LauraBaileyVO) feels a song come on as Bells Hells' adventure continues in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 110 - "In the Shadow of War"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Liam O’Brien @SamRiegel @Smashley Johnson @WillingBla
item.description: DON'T HAVE MUCH 🗣️ 🎶 Imogen Temult (@LauraBaileyVO) feels a song come on as Bells Hells' adventure continues in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 110 - "In the Shadow of War"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Liam O’Brien @SamRiegel @Smashley Johnson @WillingBla

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔🔥 Catch up with Captain Xandis and get a quick refresher on all the action of #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 110- “In the Shadow of War” with our ever-brilliant Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s one minute recap! ✨ @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBail
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD! 🔔🔥 Catch up with Captain Xandis and get a quick refresher on all the action of #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 110- “In the Shadow of War” with our ever-brilliant Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s one minute recap! ✨ @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBail

item.title: MEET THE MIGHTY NEIN 🍭 ✨ Who are the protagonists of #CriticalRole Campaign 2? Meet the adventurers of the Mighty Nein with our wondrous Lore Keeper Dani Carr in her quick recap of Exandria's beloved heroes! @Dani Carr @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @
item.description: MEET THE MIGHTY NEIN 🍭 ✨ Who are the protagonists of #CriticalRole Campaign 2? Meet the adventurers of the Mighty Nein with our wondrous Lore Keeper Dani Carr in her quick recap of Exandria's beloved heroes! @Dani Carr @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @

item.title: COME SEE US LIVE IN 2025! 🌎 🎲 We're taking our gaming table on the road to celebrate 10 incredible years of #CriticalRole! (10! Can you believe it?) Join us this December and throughout next year as we bring all the adventure in Exandria and beyond to a c
item.description: COME SEE US LIVE IN 2025! 🌎 🎲 We're taking our gaming table on the road to celebrate 10 incredible years of #CriticalRole! (10! Can you believe it?) Join us this December and throughout next year as we bring all the adventure in Exandria and beyond to a c

item.title: THE NEIN HELLS 🔔 🔥 The cast find themselves doubling up on voices as Bells Hells meet The Mighty Nein and @MatthewMercerVO has the absolute time of his life in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🍭 ✨ @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO
item.description: THE NEIN HELLS 🔔 🔥 The cast find themselves doubling up on voices as Bells Hells meet The Mighty Nein and @MatthewMercerVO has the absolute time of his life in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🍭 ✨ @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO

item.title: YOU'RE SO BIG AND STRONG 💪 🏋️ Fearne Calloway (@Smashley Johnson) sizes up Yasha Nydoorin (also Ashley Johnson) in a double-voiced chaotic encounter in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O
item.description: YOU'RE SO BIG AND STRONG 💪 🏋️ Fearne Calloway (@Smashley Johnson) sizes up Yasha Nydoorin (also Ashley Johnson) in a double-voiced chaotic encounter in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD 🔔🔥 OH MIGHTY NEIN! Catch up on the doubled up adventures of Bells Hells as some familiar friends get to know our heroes in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111- “The Nein Hells” with our ever-wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s quick recap!
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD 🔔🔥 OH MIGHTY NEIN! Catch up on the doubled up adventures of Bells Hells as some familiar friends get to know our heroes in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111- “The Nein Hells” with our ever-wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s quick recap!

item.title: OH GOD 👕 😨 @SamRiegel reveals another incredible @MatthewMercerVO t-shirt in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🔔 🔥 @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O’Brien @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @Robbie Daymond #critrole #dnd #du
item.description: OH GOD 👕 😨 @SamRiegel reveals another incredible @MatthewMercerVO t-shirt in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 111 - "The Nein Hells"! 🔔 🔥 @Smashley Johnson @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O’Brien @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @Robbie Daymond #critrole #dnd #du

item.title: ENTER THE CAGE MATCH! 🎃 Check out the #CriticalRole cast's cagiest costumes yet, this year's Halloween looks are all Nicolas Cage roles! @MatthewMercerVO is H.I. McDunnough from Raising Arizona @Marisha Ray641 is Edward Malus from The Wicker Man @Smashley
item.description: ENTER THE CAGE MATCH! 🎃 Check out the #CriticalRole cast's cagiest costumes yet, this year's Halloween looks are all Nicolas Cage roles! @MatthewMercerVO is H.I. McDunnough from Raising Arizona @Marisha Ray641 is Edward Malus from The Wicker Man @Smashley

item.title: DON'T BE RIDICULOUS ANDREA 💅✨ @Marisha Ray641 and @Robbie Daymond chill in their The Wicker Man and Honeymoon In Vegas costumes before a special Halloween edition of #CritcalRole - Episode 112 "The Assembling of Legends"! 🔔 🔥 #critrole #halloween #thedev
item.description: DON'T BE RIDICULOUS ANDREA 💅✨ @Marisha Ray641 and @Robbie Daymond chill in their The Wicker Man and Honeymoon In Vegas costumes before a special Halloween edition of #CritcalRole - Episode 112 "The Assembling of Legends"! 🔔 🔥 #critrole #halloween #thedev

item.title: NARRATIVE TELEPHONE IS BACK ON YOUTUBE 🗣️ 📞 The #CriticalRole cast reunite for an all new installment - IN PERSON! Join them as they bring you their best recreations of a delightfully devious ditty from @MatthewMercerVO, and feel free to remix and stitch
item.description: NARRATIVE TELEPHONE IS BACK ON YOUTUBE 🗣️ 📞 The #CriticalRole cast reunite for an all new installment - IN PERSON! Join them as they bring you their best recreations of a delightfully devious ditty from @MatthewMercerVO, and feel free to remix and stitch

item.title: STUNNING 💇‍♀️ ✨ @WillingBlam wigs out in his Con Air costume before the oops-all-Nic-Cage Halloween edition of #CritcalRole - Campaign 3, Episode 112 - "The Assembling of Legends"! 🔔 🔥 #critrole #halloween #costumes #cosplay #niccage #nicolascage #meme #w

item.title: QUIT HORSIN' AROUND! 🐴 🎸 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) reveals his unexpected new shape in #CritcalRole - Campaign 3, Episode 112 - "The Assembling of Legends"! 🔔 🔥 @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @MatthewMercerVO @@Marisha Ray641 @Robbie Daymond @Li

item.title: 🎁 ☃️ HAPPY CRITMAS, CRITTERS🎄 🎁 Our 3rd annual Critmas Can't Miss Sale is back and better than ever as we deck the halls with festive deals up to 60% off on tons of spectacular dice, rad apparel, cozy blankets, puzzles, games, and so much more through Dec

item.title: 🎵 C E R K O N O - S ! 🎵 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) serenades Cerkonos (@Robbie Daymond) and Captain Xandis (@MatthewMercerVO) with a song of inspiration in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - "Assault on the Malleus Key"! 🔔 🔥 @LauraBaileyVO @Smas

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD 🏹 ⚔️ An epic battle is brewing! Catch up on Vox Machina's fight to free their trapped aly from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - “Assault on the Malleus Key” with our ever-wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s quick recap before Episode 1
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD 🏹 ⚔️ An epic battle is brewing! Catch up on Vox Machina's fight to free their trapped aly from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - “Assault on the Malleus Key” with our ever-wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s quick recap before Episode 1

item.title: WHOOPS 👢👢🥴 Grog Strongjaw (@WillingBlam) accidentally creates a different kind of magic item with a slip of the tongue in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - "Assault on the Malleus Key"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Smashley Johnson @LauraBail
item.description: WHOOPS 👢👢🥴 Grog Strongjaw (@WillingBlam) accidentally creates a different kind of magic item with a slip of the tongue in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - "Assault on the Malleus Key"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Smashley Johnson @LauraBail

item.title: KEYLETH WILL YOU SIGN SOMETHING 😍 🗒️ 🪶 Keyleth (@Marisha Ray641) is ready to head out of Vasselheim as she's teased by Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) and Vex (@LauraBaileyVO) in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - "Assault on the Malleus Key"! 🔔 🔥 @Wi
item.description: KEYLETH WILL YOU SIGN SOMETHING 😍 🗒️ 🪶 Keyleth (@Marisha Ray641) is ready to head out of Vasselheim as she's teased by Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) and Vex (@LauraBaileyVO) in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 113 - "Assault on the Malleus Key"! 🔔 🔥 @Wi

item.title: YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE F*CKED WITH VOX MACHINA! 🤢 🪓 Grog Strongjaw (@WillingBlam) disposes of a foe in a particularly gristly fashion as he shows off his puppeteering skills in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @Marish
item.description: YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE F*CKED WITH VOX MACHINA! 🤢 🪓 Grog Strongjaw (@WillingBlam) disposes of a foe in a particularly gristly fashion as he shows off his puppeteering skills in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @Marish

item.title: GO ON *SNIFF* BE FREE! 😭 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) knows that if you love a giant horrible bug monster you have to let it go in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO
item.description: GO ON *SNIFF* BE FREE! 😭 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) knows that if you love a giant horrible bug monster you have to let it go in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD 🏹 ⚫ The fight for the Malleus Key is here! Catch up on Vox Machina's battle to free Vax from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - “Fight for the Bloody Bridge” with our brilliant Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s quick recap before Episode 115 be

item.title: JUST STAB ANYTHING, EXCEPT THE BEAR! 🐻 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) charismatically commands a giant creature to destroy its rider in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO @WillingBla
item.description: JUST STAB ANYTHING, EXCEPT THE BEAR! 🐻 Scanlan Shorthalt (@SamRiegel) charismatically commands a giant creature to destroy its rider in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114 - "Fight for the Bloody Bridge"! 🔔 🔥 @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO @WillingBla

item.title: BUILD @@MatthewMercerVO’s MASSIVE MALLEUS KEY MAP! ⚫🏰 Join Matthew as he builds #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114's leviathan arena battle map that saw the heroes of #TheLegendOfVoxMachina take on garganruan insectoid monsters in the latest installmen
item.description: BUILD @@MatthewMercerVO’s MASSIVE MALLEUS KEY MAP! ⚫🏰 Join Matthew as he builds #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 114's leviathan arena battle map that saw the heroes of #TheLegendOfVoxMachina take on garganruan insectoid monsters in the latest installmen

item.title: THERE'S A LOT GOING ON 👕😬 @SamRiegel reveals his latest t-shirt creation as @Marisha Ray641 tries to concentrate in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum" 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @WillingBlam @Smashley Johnson @Liam O
item.description: THERE'S A LOT GOING ON 👕😬 @SamRiegel reveals his latest t-shirt creation as @Marisha Ray641 tries to concentrate in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum" 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @WillingBlam @Smashley Johnson @Liam O

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD! 😘 Orym of the Air Ashari (@Liam O’Brien) finds the courage to kiss Dorian Storm (@Robbie Daymond) as a calamitous battle approaches in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum" 🔔 🔥 @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMe
item.description: SPOILERS AHEAD! 😘 Orym of the Air Ashari (@Liam O’Brien) finds the courage to kiss Dorian Storm (@Robbie Daymond) as a calamitous battle approaches in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum" 🔔 🔥 @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMe

item.title: HEY I PAINTED YOU A- 😦 🖼️ Braius Doomseed (@SamRiegel) gets rejected twice in a row despite his amazing paintings in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @Robbie Daymond @Liam O’Brien @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMercerVO @Laur
item.description: HEY I PAINTED YOU A- 😦 🖼️ Braius Doomseed (@SamRiegel) gets rejected twice in a row despite his amazing paintings in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @Robbie Daymond @Liam O’Brien @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMercerVO @Laur

item.title: *narrator voice* @SamRiegel did not delete this 🎅📱 Tickets for our #Daggerheart Critmas LIVE show in Camden, NJ this Dec. 7th are on sale RIGHT NOW! Get all the details ahead of time from Sam & @Marisha Ray641! GET YOUR PASS TO OUR HOLIDAY BASH AND LEARN
item.description: *narrator voice* @SamRiegel did not delete this 🎅📱 Tickets for our #Daggerheart Critmas LIVE show in Camden, NJ this Dec. 7th are on sale RIGHT NOW! Get all the details ahead of time from Sam & @Marisha Ray641! GET YOUR PASS TO OUR HOLIDAY BASH AND LEARN
